name: Splunk Connect for Syslog MCP Tools
description: Read-only MCP tools for SC4S Splunk-side readiness and data checks.
author: splunk-connect-for-syslog-setup skill

tools.name: sc4s_default_indexes
tools.title: SC4S Default Indexes
tools.description: Check common SC4S indexes and optional metrics index.
tools.spl: | rest /services/data/indexes count=0 | search title=sc4s OR title=netops OR title=osnix OR title=infraops OR title=secops OR title=sc4s_metrics | table title disabled datatype totalEventCount currentDBSizeMB maxTotalDataSizeMB splunk_server | sort title

tools.name: sc4s_hec_tokens
tools.title: SC4S HEC Token State
tools.description: Check HEC tokens that appear to target SC4S indexes.
tools.spl: | rest /services/data/inputs/http count=0 | search indexes=*sc4s* OR indexes=*netops* OR indexes=*secops* OR title=*sc4s* | table title disabled index indexes useACK sourcetype outputgroup | sort title

tools.name: sc4s_ack_default_index
tools.title: SC4S ACK And Default Index Diagnostics
tools.description: Show SC4S-related HEC acknowledgement and default index settings.
tools.spl: | rest /services/data/inputs/http count=0 | search title=*sc4s* OR indexes=*sc4s* OR indexes=*netops* OR indexes=*secops* | eval ack=if(useACK="1" OR useACK="true","enabled","disabled") | table title disabled index indexes ack sourcetype | sort title

tools.name: sc4s_startup_events
tools.title: SC4S Startup Events
tools.description: Find recent SC4S startup and collector status events indexed in Splunk.
tools.spl: search index=sc4s (sourcetype=sc4s:startup OR sourcetype=sc4s:events OR source=*sc4s*) | stats count latest(_time) as latest by host source sourcetype | eval latest=strftime(latest,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") | sort -latest

tools.name: sc4s_syslog_distribution
tools.title: SC4S Syslog Distribution
tools.description: Summarize recent SC4S syslog distribution by index, sourcetype, and host.
tools.spl: | tstats count latest(_time) as latest where index=sc4s OR index=netops OR index=osnix OR index=infraops OR index=secops by index sourcetype host | eval latest=strftime(latest,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") | sort -count
